# Team News: Germany vs. Curacao injury, suspension list, predicted XIs

By Matt Law| 13 Jun 2026 18:00

© Imago

Germany and Curacao will meet in their opening match of the 2026 World Cup on Sunday.

The two nations, who will lock horns for the first time in this contest, are competing in Group E, and here Sports Mole rounds up the team news for the game.

---

## GERMANY VS. CURACAO

## GERMANY

Out: None

Doubtful: Manuel Neuer(fitness)

Sports Mole's predicted XI: Neuer; Kimmich, Tah, Schlotterbeck, Brown; F Nmecha, Pavlovic; Sane, Musiala, Wirtz; Havertz

## CURACAO

Out: None

Doubtful: None

Sports Mole's predicted XI: Room; Sambo, Obispo, Gaari, Floranus; Comenencia, J Bacuna, L Bacuna; Chong, Gorre, Antonisse

Written by

news_items.title: Germany XI vs Curacao: Confirmed team news, predicted lineup, injury latest for World Cup | The Standard
news_items.author: Tashan Deniran-Alleyne
news_items.text:
Germany XI vs Curacao: Confirmed team news, predicted lineup, injury latest for World Cup | The Standard

# Germany XI vs Curacao: Confirmed team news, predicted lineup, injury latest for World Cup

Julian Nagelsmann has a clean bill of health ahead of Group E opener in Houston

15 hours ago

COMMENTS

Manuel Neuer is expected to be available for selection as Germany face Curacao in their 2026 World Cup opener this weekend.

The Bayern Munich goalkeeper suffered a calf injury in the final Bundesliga match of the season, forcing him to sit out both pre-tournament friendlies against Finland and the United States.

In his absence, Oliver Baumann got the nod in between the sticks ahead of Alexander Nubel and is on standby to start the Group E opener.

However, Neuer is winning his battle after returning to full training and is likely to make his return to international football having reversed his retirement decision following Euro 2024.

Manuel Neuer has not played for Germany in almost two years

Getty

With the pressure on Germany to perform better at this tournament after previous poor showings, Julian Nagelsmann will be keen for his side to get off to a flying start against a rela

# Germany vs. Curacao projected lineups, starting 11 for World Cup 2026 match in Group E

Kyle Bonn

•

Add The Sporting News on Google

JUMP TO:

- Germany projected starting 11
- Curacao projected starting 11
- Germany and Curacao World Cup rosters
- Germany vs. Curacao odds, prediction
- How to watch Germany vs. Curacao

---

Germany will begin their 2026 FIFA World Cup schedule against minnows Curacao as Die Mannschaft kick off Group E on Sunday at NRG Stadium in Houston.

Ranked 10th in the world and with four World Cup titles to their name, Germany are one of the most historic football nations in FIFA history, but have fallen on hard times since their last championship in 2014. They have been eliminated in the group stage in each of the last two tournaments, upset in embarrassing fashion in both Russia 2018 and Qatar 2022.

They open their 2026 tournament against the Blue Wave of Curacao

news_items.text:
# Germany vs Curaçao Live Today: Injury Update Brings Relief Before World Cup Opener

Author: Dogli Wilberforce
Published: 2026-06-14T14:12:33+00:00
Source: heavy.com (heavy.com)
Language: en

## Story

Germany vs Curaçao Live Today: Injury Update Brings Relief Before World Cup Opener

- 0 Shares

By

- Updated Jun 14, 2026 at 10:12am

Getty

WINSTON-SALEM, NORTH CAROLINA - JUNE 13: Manuel Neuer of Germany looks on during the training session of Germany at W. Dennie Spry Soccer Stadium one day ahead of the FIFA World Cup 2026 Group E match between Germany and Curacao at Houston Stadium on June 13, 2026 in Winston-Salem, North Carolina. (Photo by Alexander Hassenstein/Getty Images)

Germany vs Curaçao live today will open Group E action at the FIFA World Cup 2026 as four-time champions Germany face tournament debutants Curaçao in Houston. The Germany vs Curaçao World Cup clash comes with important fitness news for both teams after final training sessions before kickoff.

Germany manager Julian Nagelsmann has received a major boost with the return of veteran goalkeeper Manuel Neuer, while Curaçao team news remains positive with all players available for selection.

The latest Germany

news_items.title: Germany vs Curaçao at FIFA World Cup 2026: TV channel, how to watch, kick-off time, live stream, referee, predicted line-ups - ESPN
news_items.author: Anirudh Menon
news_items.text:
# Germany vs Curaçao at FIFA World Cup 2026: TV channel, how to watch, kick-off time, live stream, referee, predicted line-ups - ESPN

Author: Anirudh Menon
Published: 2026-06-12T10:17:05Z
Source: ESPN (espn.com)
Language: en

## Story

Germany vs Curaçao at FIFA World Cup 2026: TV channel, how to watch, kick-off time, live stream, referee, predicted line-ups - ESPN

Skip to main content Skip to navigation

play

Giants of the sport vs. the smallest nation to ever qualify for a World Cup, World #10 vs. World #82... Germany vs. Curaçao is the very definition of Goliath vs. David, and to make matters worse the underdog is coming up against a desperate, point-to-prove juggernaut.

The small Caribbean island with strong ties to the Netherlands(and a population of ~150,000 and is 444 sq.km. big) shocked everyone by qualifying for this edition and will look to pull off a rare, unlikely upset. West Germany lost to debutants Algeria(1-2) in the 1982 World Cup, a tournament in which Algeria were making their debut: and that's the kind of precedence that Curaçao will want to lean heavily on. They aren't in the best shape ahead of the Cup, having won only one off their last five games (3L, 1D

By Matt Law| 13 Jun 2026 18:00

Germany and Curacao will meet in their opening match of the 2026 World Cup on Sunday.

The two nations, who will lock horns for the first time in this contest, are competing in Group E, and here Sports Mole rounds up the team news for the game.

# Germany XI vs Curacao: Confirmed team news, predicted lineup, injury latest for World Cup

Julian Nagelsmann has a clean bill of health ahead of Group E opener in Houston

15 hours ago

COMMENTS

Manuel Neuer is expected to be available for selection as Germany face Curacao in their 2026 World Cup opener this weekend.

The Bayern Munich goalkeeper suffered a calf injury in the final Bundesliga match of the season, forcing him to sit out both pre-tournament friendlies against Finland and the United States.

In his absence, Oliver Baumann got the nod in between the sticks ahead of Alexander Nubel and is on standby to start the Group E opener.

However, Neuer is winning his battle after returning to full training and is likely to make his return to international football having reversed his retirement decision following Euro 2024.

Manuel Neuer has not played for Germany in almost two years

Ranked 10th in the world and with four World Cup titles to their name, Germany are one of the most historic football nations in FIFA history, but have fallen on hard times since their last championship in 2014. ## Story

Germany vs Curaçao at FIFA World Cup 2026: TV channel, how to watch, kick-off time, live stream, referee, predicted line-ups - ESPN

Skip to main content Skip to navigation

play

Giants of the sport vs. the smallest nation to ever qualify for a World Cup, World #10 vs. World #82... Germany vs. Curaçao is the very definition of Goliath vs. David, and to make matters worse the underdog is coming up against a desperate, point-to-prove juggernaut.

The small Caribbean island with strong ties to the Netherlands(and a population of ~150,000 and is 444 sq.km. big) shocked everyone by qualifying for this edition and will look to pull off a rare, unlikely upset. West Germany lost to debutants Algeria(1-2) in the 1982 World Cup, a tournament in which Algeria were making their debut: and that's the kind of precedence that Curaçao will want to lean heavily on. They aren't in the best shape ahead of the Cup, having won only one off their last five games (3L, 1D"}
